title: Saeima sets Latvia's defence spending at minimum 5% of GDP from 2027
summary_full: On Thursday, March 26th, the Saeima supported amendments to the National Defence Financing Law in its final reading, which mean national defence spending must be equivalent to at least 5% of gross domestic product (GDP) every year from next year.
